allow: PowerShell($t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; if \($t.StartsWith\('ERR'\)\) { Write-Output $t } else { Write-Output "token len: $\($t.Length\)"; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_axios_test.cjs 2>&1 })
PowerShell($t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_anamnesis_test.cjs 2>&1)
PowerShell(Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas'; $t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_anamnesis_test.cjs 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas\\hce-frontend'; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas'; $t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_oral_test.cjs 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas\\hce-frontend'; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; Write-Output "--- reinicio backend ---"; docker restart hce-backend-api 2>&1 | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas'; $t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_cov_consent_test.cjs 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas\\hce-frontend'; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas'; $t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_evol_test.cjs 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location 'D:\\APP-jct\\app-historias-clinicas'; $t = node testing/scripts/get_token.js; docker exec -e TOKEN=$t hce-frontend-client node /usr/src/app/tmp_catalog_test.cjs 2>&1; Remove-Item 'hce-frontend\\tmp_catalog_test.cjs' -Force; docker restart hce-frontend-client 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "frontend reiniciado")
